side_effects.description: Random itchiness at injection site when using a pen delivery device; did not occur previously with syringes over months of use

protocol_notes: OP has been using CJC-IPA for months without issue. Recently switched to a pen device with cartridges. Itchiness is intermittent, not every injection. Cartridge kept refrigerated. Dosing morning and night when remembered. Nearly finished with current cartridge.
